posts.caption:
Apple Intelligence is officially live in China — powered by Alibaba's Qwen AI model across iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS. China's regulators approved the integration, clearing the path for Apple's biggest AI market expansion yet. This is the partnership that gets Apple into one of the world's largest mobile markets.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AppleIntelligence #Alibaba #AINews #TechNews #GenerativeAI #China

story.title: Apple Intelligence launches in China via Alibaba Qwen partnership
story.dek: China's regulator approved Apple Intelligence by integrating Alibaba's Qwen AI model into iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS, marking Apple's major expansion into a key market.

posts.caption:
Reelful just launched on iOS — drop in your photos and clips, and its AI spits out finished short-form videos ready for TikTok or Reels. No timeline scrubbing, no manual cuts. It's aimed squarely at people who want polished output without learning an editor.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AIVideo #ShortFormContent #Reelful #CreatorTools #AIApps

story.title: Reelful automates short-form video creation from camera roll photos
story.dek: New iOS app uses AI to turn photos and clips into polished TikTok and Instagram Reels, targeting users who find traditional editing tools too complex.

posts.caption:
Hugging Face just dropped Real World VoiceEQ — a new benchmark designed to measure how humans actually perceive voice AI output. Most existing metrics optimize for technical accuracy; this one targets the thing that matters in production: does it sound good to a real listener? As voice AI capabilities accelerate, evaluation frameworks are finally catching up.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#HuggingFace #VoiceAI #AIBenchmark #GenerativeAI #AITools

story.title: Hugging Face releases Real World VoiceEQ benchmark for voice AI quality
story.dek: New metric measures human perception of voice AI output, advancing evaluation beyond specialized metrics as voice AI capabilities accelerate.

posts.caption:
OpenAI just went hardware. Their new Codex keyboard — built with Work Louder — has customizable keys and a physical dial that tracks your AI coding agent's reasoning level in real time. $230, and it's their first real swing at a physical AI workspace product.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#OpenAI #AItools #Codex #developertools #AIhardware

story.title: OpenAI releases $230 Codex keyboard with AI agent status lights
story.dek: OpenAI entered hardware with a specialty keyboard co-designed with Work Louder, featuring customizable keys and a reasoning-level dial for managing AI coding agents.

posts.caption:
The prompt era is over. The artists pulling ahead aren't better at describing images — they're thinking like directors: shot composition, lighting logic, iterative refinement, visual narrative. The skill gap has quietly moved from "can you generate" to "can you see."

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AIart #generativeAI #AIcreators #Midjourney #digitalart #creativetechnology

story.title: The Best AI Artists Aren't Prompting. They're Directing.
story.dek: Everyone with a browser can type a prompt. That stopped being impressive about five minutes after Midjourney launched. The real skill gap has moved somewhere else entirely.
